title: CEEFU Extra Wide Elevated Cat Bowls - Ceramic Cat Food Bowl 6.2" Raised Cat Food Bowls Elevated Shallow Cat Food Dish, Whisker Fatigue, Lead & Cadmium Free, 5" Good Height for Cat Feeding, Sage Green
features: WHISKER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: Extra Wide & Shallow design. The raised cat bowl itself is both wide and shallow enough not to trigger whisker fatigue. It gives even big cats easy access to wet food or kibble, while the tiny inner lip reduces the chance of food getting pushed out of the bowl
STURDY, DURABLE CERAMIC: Made from non-absorbent high-grade ceramic, this elevated cat bowl is heavy and sturdy enough that it won’t tip over and it won’t harbor bacteria as plastic bowls can
EASY TO CLEAN: Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, Lead and Cadmium-Free. Great height for comfortable eating. 6.2” wide, 5” tall

IDEAL FOR OLDER CATS TO EAT AND DRINK: Older cats often have joint problems that make it difficult to bend down low enough to eat from a bowl on the floor. Raised cat food bowls allow older kitties with arthritis or other ailments to get food without bending over too much or straining their bodies

GREAT GIFT FOR ANY FUR-PAREN: The chic and modern ceramic cat bowl looks paw-perfectly stylish in any household. Pets are family, too. Give them the same tableware that the rest of the family enjoys. We are responsible for providing cute but functional, cat-friendly designs, nice and secure packaging
description: Product Description Please be vigilant in identifying those shoddy plagiarizers who copy the appearance and images, but cannot replicate our quality and love for animals. "Meow, fellow cat lovers! I want to tell you about the best thing that's happened to me – CEEFU ceramic elevated cat bowls for food and water set!" Comfortable Eating This cat food bowl and water bowl are just the right height ( 5” tall ) for me, so I don't have to crouch down and strain my neck to eat or drink. " They are so cute and perfect for cats so they don’t have to strain their neck and their whiskers don’t touch the edge of the bowl" -- A Simone Better Digestion It helps prevent stomach issues like bloating and vomiting that often occur when cats eat too fast. "I'm super impressed. My cat kept vomiting after eating. I found these bowls, they are wide, white and perfect. My cats love them so do I. The bowl is wide enough for dry or wet food or even water." -- Theresa B Whisker-Friendly Shallow and Wide ( 6.2” wide) design of the bowls makes it easy for cats to reach every last piece of kibble or lap up all of their water. "T he perfect whisker friendly cat bowl!...I love how tall these bowls are and how wide they are to accommodate his face and whiskers." -- Melz More Care for Senior Cats Older cats often have joint problems that make it difficult to bend down low enough to eat from a bowl on the floor. Raised cat food bowls allow older kitties to get food without bending over too much or straining their bodies. "15 year old cat approved!" -- Mike H Comfortable Eating Better Digestion Whisker-Friendly More Care for Senior Cats Made from non-absorbent high-grade ceramic, this elevated cat bowl is heavy and sturdy enough that it won’t tip over and it won’t harbor bacteria as plastic bowls can. It's thicker and heavier (3.62 pounds), which means my clumsy paws won't accidentally tip it over and spill all my food and water. more stable and less likely to tip over. Easy to Clean: Smooth surface ensures that no residue remains after washing. No need to spend a lot of time cleaning up. Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, Lead and Cadmium-Free. We designed the two bowls slightly differently: one bowl for Water is Deeper & one bowl for Food is Shallow and Wide (like a Plate). Deeper Water Bowl - 18 fl oz of water. Shallow and Wide Food Bowl - Less Spillage Raised cat bowl itself is both wide and shallow enough not to trigger whisker fatigue. It gives even big cats easy access to wet food or kibble. While the tiny inner lip reduces the chance of food getting pushed out of the bowl. Pets are family, too. Give them the same tableware that the rest of the family enjoys. Chic and modern ceramic cat bowl looks paw-fectly stylish in any household. Grab your paws on these ceramic elevated cat food/water bowls and enjoy the elegant of eating in style. Because let's be honest, we deserve nothing but the best!
